title: Reusable Agent Tool Contract
description: The 8-field contract every reusable coding-agent tool in this hub MUST ship (mission Pillar 2), fused with Day 2 tool-design rules. Portable across Claude Code, Codex, Hermes, Gemini.

name.description: Descriptive, specific, kebab-case name (Day 2: a clear name aids selection + audit).

inputs.description: Field 2 — what it needs (typed where possible).

outputs.description: Field 3 — what it produces (concise; don't swamp context — Day 2).

when_not_to_use.description: Field 5 — its boundaries (Day 2: define what it does NOT do).

workflow.description: Field 6 — the ordered steps it executes.

validation.description: Field 7 — how we know it worked (Day 4: measurable, prefer deterministic check).

failure_handling.description: Field 8 — what happens when info is missing, tools fail, or confidence is low (Day 2: errors must teach recovery).

idempotent.description: Day 5: is it safe to retry? Default conservative = false.

deterministic_gate.description: Does correctness rest on a deterministic check (test/schema/hook) rather than model judgment? Prefer true for critical paths.
